description: Extract triangle calculation parameters from natural language text and format them according to the expected JSON structure

inputs.name: text
inputs.description: The natural language text containing triangle calculation request with base and height values

inputs.name: available_functions
inputs.description: JSON string of available function definitions to understand the expected parameter structure

output.description: Returns the exact function call structure: [{"calculate_triangle_area": {"base": [10], "height": [5], "unit": ["units", ""]}}] where the values are extracted from the input text and formatted as arrays with the actual values followed by empty strings as needed

workflow_spec.name: Triangle Function Parameter Parser
workflow_spec.description: Parses natural language query to extract function parameters for triangle area calculation and formats them according to the expected output structure
